name: Air / Solo - Mouthpiece Tip
summary: Enhance your experience with the Replacement Mouthpiece Tip for Tipped Glass Aroma Tubes.
description: Enhance your experience with the Replacement Mouthpiece Tip for Tipped Glass Aroma Tubes. Crafted from top-notch, heat-resistant materials, this BPA-free tip was specifically designed for maximum functionality and safety. Compatible with: Arizer Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
